name: bandit.live_world_nearby_camp_no_signal_control_mcw
description: No-signal live-world control on cleaned nearby bandit-camp footing: install the bounded nearby camp, remove loose saved-overmap NPCs, audit that no unassigned NPC pressure actors remain, then use the guarded wait action for a 30-minute cadence window and capture that the bandit signal path stays no-signal instead of borrowing theatrical pressure from unrelated NPC records.

steps.label: nearby_camp_no_signal_control_load_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for the cleaned nearby-camp no-signal control; startup/load only before saved-state audits

steps.label: preflight_no_signal_no_loose_overmap_npcs
steps.abort_reason: no-signal bandit contrast cannot be credited while loose saved-overmap NPC records can masquerade as pressure actors
steps.expected_immediate_state: all saved overmaps have zero NPC records after the no-loose-NPC fixture transform

steps.label: wait_30m_for_no_signal_control_cadence
steps.abort_reason: long wait was interrupted before the no-signal cadence artifact could be captured
steps.expected_visible_fact: guarded wait action completes a 30-minute no-signal cadence window; feature credit depends on same-run no-signal debug artifact lines, not the wait UI alone
steps.pre_menu_expected_visible_fact: alarm/wait mode menu is visible, then Wait a while is chosen before the duration menu

steps.label: audit_no_signal_cadence_artifact
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not show the quiet no-signal scan and 30-minute no-signal cadence skip

evidence_contract.claim: a cleaned nearby bandit-camp no-signal control has no loose saved-overmap NPC pressure actors and stays no-signal through a guarded 30-minute cadence window
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for no-signal contrast behavior
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No no-signal contrast credit unless startup/load, no-loose-NPC saved audit, guarded 30-minute wait, and same-run no-signal cadence artifact are all green/matched. This low-threat control does not claim camp-threat membership; high-threat/camp-pressure rows still need bandit_live_world roster assignment proof.
